description: Launcher-side package for name-locked celebrity/special portrait handoff before the full client asset catalog is mounted.

source_policy.required_existing_asset_hint: celebrity portrait asset in main client

notes: The approved celebrity portrait asset already exists in the main client asset set. This launcher package must map that asset by exact path once the asset-tree audit locates it.
Do not include the full game portrait catalog in the launcher. The launcher needs only the minimal fallback human package and approved name-locked/special portrait package.
